name: han-core
description: The shared foundation of the Han suite: the specialist agent roster the other plugins dispatch (adversarial reviewers, analysts, architects, investigators, and the project-manager facilitator), the project-discovery skill with its project-scanner agent, and the canonical evidence and YAGNI rule files. The documentation skills live in han-documentation, the pre-planning research skills in han-research, the planning skills in han-planning, and the coding skills in han-coding; each depends on han-core.
